response.original_title: 他人を見下す高飛車バリキャリOLも虜にする 女性専用強制開発M性感エステレズ 西野絵美 水川潤
response.overview: Hinano has built her career with overwhelming work ability and people manipulation skills. Tired of days spent scolding incompetent subordinates, she becomes interested in an ad for a massage salon she happens to see and books a massage out of curiosity... But what she finds is teasing, local massages, and pleasure torture. The arrogant woman who only knew work trembles at her first sensations of pleasure and the feeling of a kiss, awakening after just one lesbian massage session... Falling into becoming just a woman. The ultimate women-only forced development M-sensual lesbian massage where Hinano Miki immerses herself completely in her lesbian debut!
